items.title: Mandhana and Bavuma feature in TIME magazine's power list
items.summary: Smriti Mandhana and Temba Bavuma are the only cricketers to figure in "The 100 Most Influential People in Sports 2026" list published by TIME magazine
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Smriti Mandhana only Indian among TIME magazine's 100 most influential sportspersons
items.summary: The list, headlined by American basketball legend LeBron James, includes superstars from the world of sports such as football icon Lionel Messi, Chinese-American skier Eileen Gu...
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 9
items.summary: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
